name: Finsyt
description: Institutional financial intelligence — real-time quotes, fundamentals, analyst estimates, DCF valuation, earnings transcripts, SEC filings, insider trades, M&A deal flow, macro indicators, peer comp tables, and stock screener.
descriptionForModel: Use Finsyt tools to retrieve financial data for institutional research. Always attribute the 'source' field returned by each tool. For valuation work use get_dcf. For comp tables use get_peer_comps. For consensus and sentiment use get_estimates + get_earnings_transcript.

auth.instructions: Generate an API key in the Finsyt platform under Settings → API Keys, then pass it as the Authorization header: 'Authorization: Bearer <key>'.

tools.name: get_stock_quote
tools.description: Real-time stock quote, price, change, market cap, P/E, 52-week range, sector, and industry.

tools.name: get_financials
tools.description: Income statement, balance sheet, or cash flow for a company.

tools.name: get_estimates
tools.description: Analyst consensus EPS estimates, price targets, buy/sell/hold ratings, earnings surprises, and upgrade/downgrade history.

tools.name: get_dcf
tools.description: Discounted cash flow (DCF) valuation anchored to a ticker's reported FCF, with optional 5×5 sensitivity grid.

tools.name: get_earnings_transcript
tools.description: List available earnings call transcripts or retrieve the full text for a specific quarter.

tools.name: get_news
tools.description: Recent financial news headlines and summaries, company-specific or market-wide.

tools.name: get_filings
tools.description: SEC filings (10-K, 10-Q, 8-K, DEF 14A) with direct document links.

tools.name: get_insider_trades
tools.description: Recent insider trading disclosures (Form 4) — name, title, shares, price, value, buy/sell filter.

tools.name: get_deals
tools.description: M&A deal flow: latest announced/pending/completed deals, or deals involving a specific company.

tools.name: get_peer_comps
tools.description: Compare a list of tickers on key metrics: market cap, P/E, revenue growth, gross margin, net margin.

tools.name: get_macro_data
tools.description: Macroeconomic indicator series from FRED: Fed rate, CPI, GDP growth, unemployment, yield curve, VIX.

tools.name: search_companies
tools.description: Search for companies by name or partial ticker.

tools.name: screen_stocks
tools.description: Screen stocks by sector, market cap range, and exchange.

copilotForExcel.note: For Copilot for Excel, use the Excel Add-in manifest URL above or search for 'Finsyt' in the Microsoft AppSource catalog.
